inboundText:
SELECT CAST("Internet Sales Cube"."Ship ReportIng_Year" AS TEXT) AS "Ship ReportIng_Year",
  AVG("Internet Sales Cube"."Average Customer Count per Order") AS "avg:Average Customer Count per Order:ok",
  COUNT("Internet Sales Cube"."Average Customer Count per Order") AS "cnt:Average Customer Count per Order:ok",
  SUM("Internet Sales Cube"."Average Customer Count per Order") AS "sum:Average Customer Count per Order:ok"
FROM "Sales Insights - Postgres"."Internet Sales Cube - Postgres" "Internet Sales Cube - Postgres"
GROUP BY 1
outboundText:
SELECT
   CAST("datecustom_t86"."rpt_year_name" AS TEXT) AS "Ship ReportIng_Year",
   CASE WHEN (COALESCE(CAST(SUM("factinternetsales_t85"."orderquantity") AS BIGINT), 0) = 0) THEN (CAST('Infinity' AS FLOAT8) * CAST(SIGN(COUNT(DISTINCT "factinternetsales_t85"."customerkey")) AS FLOAT8)) ELSE CASE WHEN (CAST(SUM("factinternetsales_t85"."orderquantity") AS BIGINT) = 0) THEN NULL ELSE (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT "factinternetsales_t85"."customerkey") AS FLOAT8) / CAST(SUM("factinternetsales_t85"."orderquantity") AS BIGINT)) END END AS "avg:Average Customer Count per Order:ok",
   CASE WHEN (COALESCE(CAST(SUM("factinternetsales_t85"."orderquantity") AS BIGINT), 0) = 0) THEN (CAST('Infinity' AS FLOAT8) * CAST(SIGN(COUNT(DISTINCT "factinternetsales_t85"."customerkey")) AS FLOAT8)) ELSE CASE WHEN (CAST(SUM("factinternetsales_t85"."orderquantity") AS BIGINT) = 0) THEN NULL ELSE (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT "factinternetsales_t85"."customerkey") AS FLOAT8) / CAST(SUM("factinternetsales_t85"."orderquantity") AS BIGINT)) END END AS "cnt:Average Customer Count per Order:ok",
   CASE WHEN (COALESCE(CAST(SUM("factinternetsales_t85"."orderquantity") AS BIGINT), 0) = 0) THEN (CAST('Infinity' AS FLOAT8) * CAST(SIGN(COUNT(DISTINCT "factinternetsales_t85"."customerkey")) AS FLOAT8)) ELSE CASE WHEN (CAST(SUM("factinternetsales_t85"."orderquantity") AS BIGINT) = 0) THEN NULL ELSE (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT "factinternetsales_t85"."customerkey") AS FLOAT8) / CAST(SUM("factinternetsales_t85"."orderquantity") AS BIGINT)) END END AS "sum:Average Customer Count per Order:ok"
FROM
   "SalesInsights"."factinternetsales" AS "factinternetsales_t85"
JOIN
   "SalesInsights"."datecustom" AS "datecustom_t86"
ON
   "factinternetsales_t85"."shipdatekey" = "datecustom_t86"."datekey"
WHERE
   true
GROUP BY
   1
